name: Protenix-v1
description: Predicts 3D structures of protein, RNA, DNA, and small-molecule complexes. Supports contact/pocket restraints and covalent bonds. Open-source biomolecular structure prediction model reaching AlphaFold3-level performance under matched training cutoff and inference budget. Higher accuracy on protein–protein (72.7% vs 71.7% DockQ SR) and antibody–antigen interfaces (52.3% vs 48.8%) on FoldBench. Benchmarked across multiple datasets totaling 8k+ complexes (FoldBench, Runs-N-Poses, PXM-2024/2025): ~10% relative improvement over Boltz-1 and Chai-1 on protein–protein interfaces, 54.2% Ab–Ag DockQ SR, and 72.8% ligand RMSD<2Å success rate. Inference-time scaling: prediction accuracy improves with increased sampling (≈36%→48% DockQ SR from 1 to 80 seeds on antibody–antigen benchmarks).
capabilities: Predicts 3D structures of protein, RNA, DNA, and small-molecule complexes. Supports contact/pocket restraints and covalent bonds

Open-source biomolecular structure prediction model reaching AlphaFold3-level performance under matched training cutoff and inference budget. Higher accuracy on protein–protein (72.7% vs 71.7% DockQ SR) and antibody–antigen interfaces (52.3% vs 48.8%) on FoldBench

Benchmarked across multiple datasets totaling 8k+ complexes (FoldBench, Runs-N-Poses, PXM-2024/2025): ~10% relative improvement over Boltz-1 and Chai-1 on protein–protein interfaces, 54.2% Ab–Ag DockQ SR, and 72.8% ligand RMSD<2Å success rate
Inference-time scaling: prediction accuracy improves with increased sampling (≈36%→48% DockQ SR from 1 to 80 seeds on antibody–antigen benchmarks)

sequences.description: Array of entity objects. Each entity has a type (protein, rna, dna, or ligand) and corresponding sequence or CCD code.

sequence.description: Amino acid sequence for protein, nucleotide sequence for RNA/DNA

numSamples.description: Number of structure predictions to return. More samples improve accuracy for difficult targets.

numSeeds.description: Number of random seeds for inference-time scaling. More seeds improve prediction accuracy.

pocketRestraints.description: Pocket restraints for binding site specification
